## Checklist

- [ ] Description explains **why** the change is needed (not just what)
- [ ] One logical change per PR (separate unrelated refactors)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `go test ./server/...` clean
- [ ] `cd ui && npm run build` clean
- [ ] Updated docs for behavior/config/API changes
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
